name: Brainy Bran Muffins
recipeInstructions:
1. Place paper liners in a muffin tin and preheat the oven to 375°F (190°C).
2. In a mixing bowl, combine butter and brown sugar. Cream together until smooth.
3. Add honey and blend.
4. Add eggs and blend on low speed. The mixture will look soupy.
5. Gradually add half of the flour, all of the baking soda, cinnamon, and salt.
6. Add bran flakes and blend.
7. Add half of the buttermilk and blend.
8. Add the remaining flour, followed by the remaining buttermilk. Blend until smooth.
9. Stir in raisins. Spoon batter into the muffin tin until 3/4 full.
10. Carefully place the muffin tin in the oven with mitted hands and bake for 25 minutes.
11. Turn off the oven and carefully remove the muffin tin with mitted hands.
12. Let the muffins cool for 10 minutes, then turn the tin on its side to let the muffins fall out.
13. Use a table knife to loosen any stubborn muffins if needed.
14. Cool completely before wrapping in plastic wrap to freeze. Makes 12 muffins.
